creator: greg@greg.rim.or.jp
text:
I have created a new ports about cqcam-0.45.
It is greate one for me, and you (May be).
cqcam-0.45 is a frame grabber program with Color Q-CAM.
And I have sent to incoming directory at Oct 29. it's name is
"cqcam-0.45.tar.gz".

- PS -
	I have created few ports (innfeed/nntplink-3.3).
I'll send it, is you need.
